case_title: DEBORA GONCALVES SANTOS VS. CLEAR FOCUS COACHING INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, DEBORA GONCALVES AS TO DEFENDANT CLEAR FOCUS COACHING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA CLEAR FOCUS MARKETING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
